name: get_customer_context
description: Returns a compact summary of a customer including their 3 most recent orders, open support tickets, and key account notes. Use this when preparing a retention offer, diagnosing an issue, or onboarding a new account manager. Do NOT use for bulk reporting: use search_customers with a filter instead.

customer_id.description: The customer's internal ID from Salesforce (format: '00Q5f...'). For email-based lookup use search_customers first.
